name: Cranberry Pumpkin Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 1 1/2 cups Fresh or frozen cranberries, coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease and flour an 8x4-inch loaf pan.
3. In a medium bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, nutmeg, and allspice.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine the pumpkin, oil, and eggs. Add to the dry ingredients, stirring until just moistened.
5. Stir in the cranberries. Spread evenly in the prepared pan.
6. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 1/2 hours, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
